dialogues.speaker: Ranger May
lines: The island's water cycle is broken. Help me fix it, step by step.
Talk to the spirits along the path. Stand in front of one and press A (or tap).
Press J anytime to open your Field Journal and review what you have learned.

dialogues.speaker: Wooden Sign
lines: Follow the path: Mist -> Ridge -> Sky -> Soil -> Riverbed -> Floodmaster.
Clear all five spirits, then face the Guardian to earn the Water Drop Badge.

dialogues.speaker: Stone Gate
lines: The way to Verdant Canopy is sealed.
Earn the Water Drop Badge by defeating the Floodmaster to open this gate.

dialogues.speaker: Ranger Tan
lines: You made it to Verdant Canopy!
This rainforest hides many secrets in its layers.
Study its structure and adaptations, then face the Clearcutter.

dialogues.speaker: Vine Gate
lines: The trail to Tidewood Mangroves is overgrown.
Earn the Canopy Badge to clear the way.

dialogues.speaker: Ranger Siti
lines: Welcome to the Tidewood Mangroves, the island's last frontier.
These tangled roots protect our coast.
Learn their secrets, then hold back the Storm Surge to heal the island.
